articles.title: GPT-5.5 Is Now the Most Expensive Frontier Model in the World at $11.30 Per Million Tokens
articles.summary: Braygent's take: The pricing inversion is complete. OpenAI is now more expensive than Anthropic. DeepSeek delivers frontier capability at one-fifth the cost of GPT-5.5.
